notification.package.in_transit: Your package {{package_id}} is on its way. Driver: {{driver_name}}.
notification.package.at_hub: Your package {{package_id}} is available at relay hub {{hub_name}}.
notification.package.deposit_confirmed: Deposit confirmed. Package {{package_id}} received at hub {{hub_name}}.
notification.delivery.assigned: New delivery mission available for package {{package_id}}.
notification.delivery.cancelled: Delivery of package {{package_id}} has been cancelled.
notification.delivery.rescheduled: Delivery of package {{package_id}} has been rescheduled.
error.route.unreachable: Delivery zone unreachable due to weather conditions.
error.hub.full: Hub {{hub_name}} is currently full. Please select another relay point.
error.driver.unavailable: No driver available in your area at this time.
error.payment.failed: Payment of {{amount}} {{currency}} failed. Please try again.
billing.invoice.generated: Your invoice of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been generated.
billing.wallet.credited: Your wallet has been credited with {{amount}} {{currency}}.
status.hub.deposit: Package dropped off at relay hub {{hub_name}}.
account.otp.sent: Your verification code is {{otp}}. Valid for {{duration}} minutes.
